data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The Restoration Project: D.U. Shiratori City event is starting!

The damage to Shiratori City is...extensive. Sensei, please help the students with the clean-up effort!

#BlueArchive![zAYGeCDCle1lq7wPikhNUl6hhv9ELJLJ.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/zAYGeCDCle1lq7wPikhNUl6hhv9ELJLJ.jpg)
